label: successor
gloss: the successor operation S : N -> N; S(n) is the number after n.
notes: Primitive of the profile-M v0 basis (design-math-sector.md SS2.2, SS3.2); pinned to the bundle's basis table, analogous to a profile-1 prime record.

nsmBridge.note: 'one more' wants MORE over a quantifier inside an SP, which profile-1's closed grammar licenses only as a comparative operator over mods/quants, not as a numeral-former; no honest explication within the closed grammar.
